query: SELECT a.id, a.clientLocalId, a.date, a.time, a.status, c.name as clientName FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientLocalId = c.localId WHERE c.phone = '+15559871234' ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
